title: Entity Apply Knockback Rules
description: Defines how an entity applies knockback.

presets.title: Presets
presets.description:
Array of rules instances defining how knockback should be applied to the entity.

Properties:
• check_if_target_is_immersed_in_water (boolean) = false
• filter ({ domain, operator, subject, ... }) = {"AND":null,"NOT":nu
• horizontal_power (float) = 1
• vertical_power (float) = 0.4000000059604645
• vertical_velocity_cap (float) = 0.4000000059604645

Sample values:
• egg: [{"vertical_power":0.12,"vertical_velocity_cap"...
• iron_golem: [{"horizontal_power":1.3,"vertical_power":0.39,...
• player: [{"filter":{"test":"enum_property","subject":"o...
